de.uka.ilkd.key.util

Class XMLResources

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.util.XMLResources

  • public class XMLResources
extends Object
    An instance of this class loads several XML files, whose contents are displayed in InfoView.
    Author:
    Kai Wallisch
